home.hero_sub: Take our psychometric assessment and let our advanced machine learning engine predict your optimal career path, identify skill gaps, and guide your journey.
home.why_sub: Comprehensive AI-powered tools designed to help you make informed career decisions
home.feature1_desc: Advanced psychometric assessments using RIASEC and Multiple Intelligence frameworks
home.feature2_desc: Get career recommendations tailored to your unique personality, skills, and interests
home.feature3_desc: Identify the skills you need and get personalized course recommendations
home.feature4_desc: Step-by-step execution plans to bridge the gap from where you are to where you want to be
home.feature5_desc: Get instant, personalized advice from our AI career mentor available 24/7
home.feature6_desc: Track your learning progress with gamified milestones, XP and daily streaks

dashboard.title: Mission Control
dashboard.no_curriculum_desc: You need to choose a career path to generate your AI masterplan.
dashboard.all_tasks_cleared: You've cleared all daily tasks. Check timeline for next phase.
dashboard.regenerate_desc: Regenerate your AI curriculum based on your latest assessment.
dashboard.mapping_phases: Our AI is mapping out your phases, detailing action steps, and structuring your daily execution missions...
dashboard.timeout_desc: The AI curriculum took too long to build. This can happen during peak loads.
dashboard.review_syllabus: Review your tailored syllabus below. When you're ready, initialize the gamified execution engine to start tracking your daily progress.
dashboard.start_missions_xp: Start your daily missions and earn XP.

skill_gap.title: Skill Gap Analysis
skill_gap.subtitle: Identify the skills you need and get personalized course recommendations
skill_gap.cta_desc: Get personalized course recommendations based on your skill gaps.

results.title: Your Career Matches
results.subtitle: Based on your psychometric profile, here are the careers that best match you.
results.not_satisfied_title: Not satisfied with your career results?
results.not_satisfied_desc: The Quick Assessment provides a baseline, but our advanced Machine Learning model works best when you provide more data. Complete the full 55-question psychometric evaluation for highly accurate, personalized career matching.
results.processing_sub: Your psychometric profile is being analyzed by our ensemble model (XGBoost + SVM + Gradient Boosting). This takes ~30 seconds.
results.no_assessment_desc: You haven't completed a psychometric assessment yet.
results.error_desc: The ML pipeline encountered an error. Please try retaking the assessment.
results.answers_saved: answers saved. Continue from where you left off to improve your ML prediction accuracy.

assessment.question: Question
assessment.select_best: Select the option that best describes you.
assessment.elaborate: Elaborate your thoughts in the text area.
assessment.profile_queued: Your profile is being queued. Redirecting to results...
assessment.full_assessment_complete: You've completed the full psychometric assessment! Submit now to receive your complete career analysis.
assessment.partial_analysis: You can see your partial career analysis now, or continue to get a more accurate result.

inclination.title: Quick Inclination
inclination.subtitle: Part 1 of 4
inclination.desc: 5 rapid-fire questions to set your baseline.

objective.title: Core Objective
objective.subtitle: Part 2 of 4
objective.desc: Comprehensive evaluation of your 10 core traits.

preference.title: Preferences
preference.subtitle: Part 3 of 4
preference.desc: Situational scenarios and work style options.

subjective.title: Subjective Details
subjective.subtitle: Part 4 of 4
subjective.desc: In-depth textual elaboration on your goals.

preferences.activity: Which activity do you enjoy the most?
preferences.subject: Which subject do you like the most?
preferences.environment: What kind of work environment do you prefer?

questions.inc1: I prefer to have a clear plan before starting a new project.
questions.inc2: I am comfortable adapting to unexpected changes in my environment.
questions.inc3: I naturally take charge and lead group discussions.
questions.inc4: I prefer working with concrete data and numbers over abstract concepts.
questions.inc5: I consider myself a highly creative and out-of-the-box thinker.
questions.q1: I enjoy solving puzzles and brain teasers.
questions.q2: I like analyzing data and finding patterns.
questions.q3: Mathematics is one of my strong subjects.
questions.q4: I enjoy experimenting and testing ideas.
questions.q5: I prefer tasks that require critical thinking.
questions.q6: I like understanding how systems or machines work.
questions.q7: I enjoy drawing, designing, or creating art.
questions.q8: I prefer creative tasks over structured ones.
questions.q9: I like expressing ideas through writing or storytelling.
questions.q10: I enjoy music, dance, or performing arts.
questions.q11: I think differently and come up with unique ideas.
questions.q12: I enjoy working on design-related tools.
questions.q13: I enjoy helping others solve their problems.
questions.q14: I like working in teams rather than alone.
questions.q15: I am comfortable speaking in front of people.
questions.q16: I enjoy teaching or explaining concepts.
questions.q18: I prefer careers that involve interaction with people.
questions.q19: I like leading teams or organizing events.
questions.q20: I enjoy convincing or influencing people.
questions.q21: I am interested in business or startups.
questions.q22: I take initiative in group activities.
questions.q25: I enjoy working with tools, machines, or hardware.
questions.q26: I prefer hands-on activities over theory.
questions.q27: I like building or fixing things.
questions.q28: I enjoy outdoor or physical work.
questions.q29: I am interested in engineering or technical fields.
questions.q30: I prefer practical tasks over desk jobs.
questions.q31: I like organizing data, files, or schedules.
questions.q32: I prefer structured and clear instructions.
questions.q33: I pay attention to small details.
questions.q34: I enjoy working with numbers, records, or documentation.
questions.q35: I prefer routine and stability in work.
questions.q36: I like planning and managing tasks efficiently.
questions.q41: Describe an activity you enjoy doing the most and why.
questions.q42: What are your top 3 strengths? Explain briefly.
questions.q43: What type of career do you currently feel interested in and why?
questions.q44: Describe a situation where you solved a problem successfully.
questions.q45: What kind of work would make you feel satisfied every day?
questions.q46: Do you prefer working alone or in a team? Explain your choice.
questions.q47: What are your long-term goals or aspirations?
questions.q48: Describe a project or task you were passionate about.
questions.q49: What skills do you think you need to improve for your future career?
questions.q50: If there were no restrictions, what career would you choose and why?
